title: Epilepsy medication review
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

examination.text: Supports seizure frequency, adherence, alcohol or drug use, uncontrolled seizures, abnormal neurological findings, and clinician-documented risk and safety discussion.
examination.rationale: Supports adherence, seizure-frequency and safety discussion for epilepsy medication review; no decision is generated.
examination.evidence_extract: Supports seizure frequency, adherence, alcohol or drug use, uncontrolled seizures, abnormal neurological findings, and clinician-documented risk and safety discussion.

source.title: Epilepsies in children, young people and adults

exact_section.heading: Recommendations 10.1.1–10.2.2 — epilepsy-related death and SUDEP risk

referral.text: Supports seizure-control and adverse-effect review, clinician-led medication and interaction review, antiseizure medication levels when indicated, care review, and pregnancy-related specialist review without mapping a dose.
referral.rationale: Supports seizure-control, adverse-effect, medicine, interaction and monitoring review for epilepsy medication review; no decision is generated.
referral.evidence_extract: Supports seizure-control and adverse-effect review, clinician-led medication and interaction review, antiseizure medication levels when indicated, care review, and pregnancy-related specialist review without mapping a dose.

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Epilepsy type, seizures, medicine names and doses, adherence, adverse effects, interactions, levels, pregnancy context and clinician plan are absent.
No diagnosis, interpretation, investigation, treatment, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, escalation or disposition is generated for epilepsy medication review.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
